'''Q'Maere''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]]. The planet had a deadly, poisonous atmosphere, full of [[Chlorine/Legends|chlorine]], and the sky was a sickly green. The majority of the surface was a caustic [[Ammonia/Legends|ammonia]] ocean interspersed with volcanic [[Salt/Legends|salt]]-caked islands. The planet was the location of the [[Q'Maere Research Facility]].

==Appearances==
